questions.q: Read the extract below and answer the following question.
questions.answer: The extract highlights the importance of freedom and individuality.

questions.q: Who among the following is NOT a part of the group of revolutionaries?
Explain the significance of the phrase 'We are not afraid to die' in the context of the poem.
questions.answer: The phrase signifies the willingness of the revolutionaries to sacrifice their lives for the cause of freedom.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: The poem is written in the form of a _______________.
True or False: The poem is written in the first person.
What is the main theme of the poem?
questions.answer: The main theme of the poem is the struggle for freedom and individuality.

questions.q: Identify the poet and the title of the poem.
questions.answer: The poet is Pablo Neruda and the title of the poem is 'We Are Not Afraid to Die'.

questions.q: Who among the following is a character in the poem?
Explain the use of imagery in the poem.
questions.answer: The poem uses imagery to create a vivid picture of the struggle for freedom and individuality.

questions.q: Who is the speaker of the poem?
questions.answer: The speaker of the poem is a group of revolutionaries.
